name: Quick Spanish Hamburger Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (2 oz.) mushroom stems and pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef in a saucepan until browned, then drain off any excess fat.
2. Stir in salt and pepper.
3. Add tomato sauce, carrot, mushrooms, onion, olives, and sugar to the pan.
4. Pour in water and wine, stirring to combine everything evenly.
5. Cover the pot and simmer for 30-35 minutes, or until the carrot is tender. Stir occasionally during cooking.
6. Serve individual portions with grated parmesan cheese on top, if desired. This recipe serves 2 people.
